title: Linter Finding
description: Schema for structured linter finding records

finding_id.description: Unique finding identifier in FIND-YYYY-NNN format

human_review_required.description: Whether this finding requires human review before the workflow can be approved

node_name.description: Name of the workflow node where the finding was detected

evidence_path.description: JSONPath to the evidence location in the workflow

evidence_value.description: The actual value that triggered the finding

description.description: Human-readable description of the finding and its governance significance

csa_ai.description: CSA AI control themes this finding relates to

maestro.description: MAESTRO threat layers this finding relates to

owasp_llm.description: OWASP LLM Top 10 items this finding relates to

finding_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the finding was generated

_governance_note.description: Note clarifying the fictional or portfolio nature of the record
